meaning: n.同住者,同室者(特指在医院、监狱),居民
examples: An inmate learns to ride a unicycle in the prison gym seriously.
He learned this song as an inmate at a Texas prison.
A large Caucasian inmate steps forward.
My fellow inmate responded with the best advice on management that I had ever received.
Authorities were alerted by a letter from the inmate mailed to the governor's office in December.
